title: Approval of FY2025/26 Budget Policy Statement
description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2025/26 Budget Policy Statement for tabling in the National Assembly, targeting a fiscal deficit of 4.3% of GDP.

title: Approval of Public Debt Management Strategy 2025-2028
description: The Board resolved to approve the Medium-Term Debt Management Strategy 2025-2028, targeting a reduction in external debt from 52% to 45% of total public debt by 2028.

title: Approval of Kenya Airways Restructuring Support Framework
description: The Board resolved to approve the financial restructuring support framework for Kenya Airways, including a KES 12 billion government guarantee facility subject to performance milestones.

title: Approval of SOE Dividend Policy — Minimum 25% Payout
description: The Board resolved to approve a revised SOE dividend policy requiring all profitable state corporations to remit a minimum of 25% of after-tax profit as dividend to the Consolidated Fund.
